prestazioni: ADU 2.2L 20V Turbo (engine code: **ADU**) hybrid turbo upgrade using a **Garrett GT2860R-5** with billet compressor wheel (60mm inducer, 76mm exducer) and 0.82 A/R turbine housing, paired with a **Tial MV-R 38mm external wastegate** to manage boost at 1.6 bar (23 psi) on 100-octane fuel, supported by a **Mahle Motorsport forged piston set** (8.5:1 compression) and **Manley H-beam connecting rods** with ARP 2000 rod bolts

Full **Porsche 964 Turbo S** fuel system retrofit: **Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump**, **Siemens DEKA 60lb/hr injectors** (flow-matched via **Injector Dynamics ID1000** calibration), and a **Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump** with a **Radium Engineering dual-pump hanger**, controlled via a **Syvecs S6Plus standalone ECU** with flex-fuel capability and **Motec C125 dash logger** for real-time monitoring

Custom **Pectel SQ6M engine management** with **Porsche 993 GT2** ignition system (coil-on-plug conversion) and **NGK R7437-9** iridium spark plugs gapped at 0.024", paired with a **GReddy Profec B Spec II** boost controller and **HJS 200-cell metallic catalytic converter** for emissions compliance without sacrificing flow
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V1 RS2** widebody kit (carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper) with **custom 3M Matte Pearl White (9510) wrap** and **OEM Porsche 911 (993) GT2 rear wing** (modified with **Vorsteiner carbon fiber endplates**) for downforce balance

**BBS RS-GT II** 18x9.5" (ET15) front and 18x11" (ET5) rear wheels with **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R** tires (235/40/18 front, 285/35/18 rear), paired with **AP Racing 6-piston front/4-piston rear big brake kit** (355mm rotors) and **Ferodo DS2500** pads for track use

**Recaro Sportster CS** (Porsche 964-spec) front seats with **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses**, **MOMO Mod.78** steering wheel (350mm, suede), and **Audi Sport quattro S1** shift knob (short-throw adapter), complemented by a **full Alcantara headliner** and **custom RS2-specific roll cage** (TIG-welded, **Custom Cages UK**) with **Sparco harness bar**
